title: Laptop VPN Setup
body: To access internal dashboards from a company laptop, install the VPN client, sign in with SSO, and connect before opening private services.

title: Password Manager Enrollment
body: All employees must enroll in the company password manager and enable MFA before storing production credentials or shared team logins.

title: Expense Reimbursement Policy
body: Employees should submit travel and meal receipts within 30 days using the finance portal reimbursement form.

title: Manager Expense Approval
body: Expense reports above 500 dollars require manager approval before finance can process reimbursement.

title: On-Call Incident Process
body: If production is degraded, page the on-call engineer, open an incident channel, and post updates every 15 minutes until mitigation is complete.

title: Severity Definitions
body: Severity 1 incidents block customer-critical workflows, Severity 2 incidents degrade major features, and Severity 3 incidents have workarounds.

title: Customer Support Escalation
body: Urgent customer issues should be escalated to tier two support with logs, screenshots, timestamps, and account identifiers attached.

title: Support SLA Targets
body: Priority one tickets should receive a first response within 15 minutes and priority two tickets within one business hour.

title: Access Review Checklist
body: Managers must review employee access to internal tools quarterly and remove permissions that are no longer required.

title: Offboarding Checklist
body: When an employee leaves, IT must disable SSO, revoke VPN access, rotate shared credentials, and archive device inventory records.

title: Engineering Deployment Guide
body: Deployments should be rolled out gradually using canary stages, metrics checks, and an approved rollback plan.

title: Rollback Procedure
body: If a deployment causes errors, revert to the last healthy version, confirm error rates normalize, and update the incident timeline.

title: New Hire Equipment Request
body: Managers should submit laptop and monitor requests at least five business days before a new hire start date.

title: Employee Onboarding Checklist
body: Before the first day, HR should confirm signed documents, IT should provision accounts, and the manager should schedule onboarding meetings.

title: Database Backup Policy
body: Production databases are backed up daily, retention is thirty days, and restore drills are run quarterly.

title: Restore Drill Procedure
body: To validate backups, restore the latest snapshot into staging, run smoke tests, and document recovery time.

title: API Key Rotation Guide
body: Service API keys should be rotated every ninety days and immediately after suspected leakage.

title: Secret Scanning Response
body: If a credential is committed to git, revoke it immediately, rotate the secret, and open a security incident.

title: Procurement Approval Policy
body: Software purchases above the team budget threshold need finance and security review before approval.

title: Vendor Security Review
body: New vendors handling customer data must complete a security questionnaire and sign the standard data processing addendum.

title: Knowledge Base Writing Guide
body: Support documentation should use short headings, clear troubleshooting steps, and explicit next actions.

title: Incident Postmortem Template
body: Every severe incident should have a postmortem covering impact, timeline, root cause, mitigation, and follow-up actions.

title: Production Access Policy
body: Production access is limited to approved engineers, requires MFA, and must be justified through the access request workflow.

title: Code Review Expectations
body: All pull requests should have at least one reviewer, test evidence, and a rollback note for risky changes.

title: Travel Booking Policy
body: Flights should be booked through the approved travel portal unless an exception is approved by finance.

title: Customer Refund Process
body: Refunds above the auto-approval limit require support notes, fraud review, and finance approval.

title: PII Handling Guide
body: Customer personal data should only be stored in approved systems and must be redacted from logs and screenshots.

title: Log Retention Policy
body: Application logs are retained for 30 days in standard environments and 90 days for audited services.

title: Feature Flag Rollout Guide
body: New features should be enabled behind flags, tested with internal users first, and expanded gradually.

title: Team Pager Ownership
body: Each service must have a documented primary and secondary pager owner with weekly rotation coverage.
